use_cases: Displaying customer testimonials on landing pages to build social proof
Showcasing reviews in an auto-scrolling infinite carousel loop
Featuring customer quotes with profile images and roles on business websites
Creating testimonial sections with hover interactions for enhanced engagement
Displaying horizontal scrolling reviews with customizable speed and direction
ai_summary: A testimonials carousel component that displays customer reviews in an auto-scrolling infinite loop. Features smooth motion animations, hover scale effects, customizable speed and direction controls, and supports both light and dark modes. Each testimonial card includes text, highlighted keywords, profile image, name, and role, making it ideal for social proof sections on SaaS, e-commerce, or business websites.
